sections.paragraph:
συγχέω/συγχύν(ν)ω [σύν, χέω ‘pour’] ‘cause to be jumbled’

—a. w. focus on circumstances so unusual as to affect one’s ability to process them mentally or emotionally confuse, confound, pass.be confounded Ac 2:6.

—b. w. focus on instigation of mob action, stir up Ac 21:27.

—c. w. focus on reaction to instigation, pass. w. act. sense be in uproar Ac 19:32; 21:31. συνεχύϑη ὁλὴ ἡ πόλις αἰσχύνης the entire city was in uproar out of shame (for the alleged dishonor perpetrated on Artemis) Ac 19:29 v.l.
